title: Salty Light Midnight Craving Middle Eastern Paccheri Pasta Stir-fry
description: A light and savory Middle Eastern dish featuring paccheri pasta with a quick deglaze of flavorful ingredients for a midnight craving.
instructions: Preheat oven to 500°F (260°C). Cook paccheri pasta according to package directions.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Deglaze the pan with the lemon juice, scraping any browned bits off the bottom of the pan.
Stir in sumac powder and salt to taste. Remove from heat immediately after deglazing.
Drain pasta and add it to the pan with garlic mixture. Toss until evenly coated.
Add parsley on top before serving.
